item.title: clawhq install --from-source
item.intent: Enable zero-trust users to clone, audit, and build OpenClaw from source with the same install command. The from-source path must produce an identical engine artifact.
item.description: USER VALUE: Advanced zero-trust acquisition for security-paranoid users. Not on default install path. Blocked by CQ-014 and CQ-003 anyway. Build after trusted-cache install is working end-to-end.
steps: Run two-stage Docker build from cloned source
Verify built artifact matches release artifact
acceptanceCriteria: From-source build produces identical engine artifact to cached install
Build completes without network calls beyond initial clone
